Creating voice AI experiences with natural prosody and rhythm

pros: Novel angle: voice plus smart glasses
Strong demos on prosody and latency
review.verdict: Best-in-class vocal expressiveness, but product is young and gated so production bets are premature.
review.best_for: Demos and prototypes where naturalness of voice is the primary success metric
review.not_for: Shipping teams that need mature multilingual TTS with broad voice library today
